description: Google Cloud Talent Solution Job Search lets employers, job boards, and related platforms manage job postings and search them with Google’s matching and filtering capabilities. The service is part of Google Cloud Talent Solution.
summary: jobs.googleapis.com exposes Google Cloud Talent Solution Job Search REST APIs on v4, plus deprecated v4beta1 and v3 REST versions; all require Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.

surfaces.name: Cloud Talent Solution Job Search REST API
Cloud Talent Solution Job Search REST API v3 (deprecated)
Cloud Talent Solution Job Search REST API v4beta1 (deprecated)
